query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'concierge_services' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'concierge_sales' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'price_label';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user kmGoXqmAzDGYCHX.75a102e4d6cb --database h57JzrJUFhgVF2g2BrDxyQ --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'concierge_services' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'concierge_sales' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'price_label';
stdout:

id

COLUMN_NAME
